canonical_definition: Spurious correlation removal (SCR), a procedure that trains classifiers on biased data and ablates latents encoding the spurious signal to test concept isolation.
papers: Learning Multi-Level Features with Matryoshka Sparse Autoencoders
SAEBench: A Comprehensive Benchmark for Sparse Autoencoders in Language Model Interpretability
